title: DeepSeek V4 Analysis..
summary: Caleb Writes Code analyzes DeepSeek V4, highlighting its achievement in reducing inference costs and computational demands while maintaining performance. The video frames V4 within the broader open-versus-closed model competition, attributing different optimization priorities to different nations' incentive structures.
